title: Settings
cards: Features Toggle experimental or upcoming features Facilities Status Tracking Show application due dates and status on the Facilities page FAQ Assistant Chatbot Show the AI FAQ assistant. Off by default to avoid loading it on every page.
Notifications Email Notifications Receive updates about your applications Status Updates Get notified when application status changes Action Items Alerts for tasks requiring your attention
Profile Information First Name Last Name Email Email address cannot be changed Phone Number Save Changes
Security Current Password New Password Password must be at least 6 characters long Confirm New Password Change Password
